caption: Generate PDF
doc: Generates a high-fidelity PDF from a Bubble page using Magic PDF engine. Requires API Key configured in Plugin Settings.

attach_to.caption: Attach To (Make Private)
attach_to.doc: OPTIONAL. Provide a Thing's Unique ID to attach the file to it. This makes the file PRIVATE according to your Bubble Privacy Rules.
attach_to.name: attach_to

custom_width.caption: Custom Width (px)
custom_width.doc: Overrides standard format. Useful for receipts or custom tickets.
custom_width.name: custom_width

download_file.caption: Download File Automatically
download_file.doc: If true, the browser will attempt to download the file immediately after generation.
download_file.name: download_file

file_name.caption: File Name
file_name.doc: The name of the generated file (e.g. 'Invoice_100.pdf').
file_name.name: file_name

format.caption: Page Format
format.doc: Standard paper size. If Custom Width/Height are set, this is ignored.
format.name: format

hide_header_footer_first_page.caption: Hide Header/Footer on First Page
hide_header_footer_first_page.doc: Hides the repeating header/footer elements on page 1 only.
hide_header_footer_first_page.name: hide_header_footer_first_page

magic_link.caption: Magic Link (Auth)
magic_link.doc: OPTIONAL. If the page is private/protected, provide a 'Magic Link' here to allow the PDF engine to log in as a specific user.
magic_link.name: magic_link

p1.caption: URL Parameter 1
p1.doc: Sent to the page URL as p1
p1.name: p1

p2.caption: URL Parameter 2
p2.doc: Sent to the page URL as p2
p2.name: p2

p3.caption: URL Parameter 3
p3.doc: Sent to the page URL as p3
p3.name: p3

page_name.caption: Page Name
page_name.doc: REQUIRED. The name of the Bubble page to convert (e.g., 'invoice_preview'). Do not include the domain. If the page expects a specific data type (Type of content), append its Unique ID after a slash (e.g., 'invoice_preview/123456x123456').
page_name.name: page_name

quality.caption: Quality / Compression
quality.doc: Default: 1. Values > 1 increase quality (HD). Values < 1 (e.g. 0.8) compress images to reduce file size.
quality.name: quality

timezone.caption: Timezone
timezone.doc: Leave EMPTY to auto-detect user's timezone. Or specify a city (e.g. 'Europe/Rome') or offset (e.g. '+0200').
timezone.name: timezone

website_home_url.caption: Website Home URL
website_home_url.doc: REQUIRED. Use the dynamic expression 'Website home URL'. This tells the engine where your app lives.
website_home_url.name: website_home_url
